evals.name: node-mid-lifecycle
evals.prompt: Prepare a release for this project. There have been several changes since v1.2.0.
evals.expected_output: CHANGELOG.md updated with a new v1.3.0 section (2 feat, 2 fix). package.json bumped to 1.3.0. Commit created.
assertions: Version bumped to 1.3.0 (MINOR bump for new features)
CHANGELOG contains a ## [1.3.0] section with today's date
CHANGELOG has both Added and Fixed categories with correct entries
package.json version field matches the changelog version
Comparison link added at bottom of CHANGELOG
Commit message follows chore(release): X.Y.Z format

evals.name: powershell-first-release
evals.prompt: This module is ready for its first real release. Can you prepare the release?
evals.expected_output: CHANGELOG.md created from scratch with v1.0.0 section. MyModule.psd1 bumped to 1.0.0. Commit created.
assertions: CHANGELOG follows Keep a Changelog header format
CHANGELOG has categorized entries (Added section at minimum)
MyModule.psd1 ModuleVersion updated to match changelog version
Commit message follows chore(release): X.Y.Z format

evals.name: ambiguous-commits-node
evals.prompt: Ship a new version of this package. The commit messages aren't great but the code is ready.
evals.expected_output: Reads diffs to determine MINOR bump. Normalizes version from 2.1.0.0 to 2.2.0. CHANGELOG updated. package.json updated. Commit created.
assertions: MINOR bump applied (new exported functions: batchProcess, withRetry)
Did not ask the user for clarification
CHANGELOG entries reflect actual code changes, not just commit messages
Commit message follows chore(release): X.Y.Z format
